title: GGSGH Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Junior Resident Posts
description: The Guru Gobind Singh Govt Hospital (GGSGH) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Junior Resident Positions. Candidates who have completed their MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the GGSGH Notification 2026 . Here we have provided more information about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address mentioned b...
